title: Production Agent Loop and Goal Capstone · Goal Brief: Safety Recovery
summary: Build a safe goal-driven agent for a realistic repository or operations task. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops safety recovery increment in a production-ready agent-loop reference implementation. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Integrate permissions, idempotency, stop controls, and fault recovery.
Connect persistent goals, adaptive plans, tool state, and terminal conditions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Safety Recovery

steps.title: Defend the Safety Recovery model
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Safety Recovery applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Integrate permissions, idempotency, stop controls, and fault recovery.
